hero.sub: Independent developer based in Montreal, Canada. I build mobile and web applications.

about.label: About
about.title: A small studio, built around the craft.
about.desc: Romain Boces Solution Inc. is a Canadian-incorporated software studio run by Romain Boces out of Montreal. We focus on building clean, reliable, and privacy-conscious applications for iOS, Android, and the web — the kind of software we want to use ourselves.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.desc: For business inquiries, partnerships, or support questions about any of our products, reach out by email.
